description: Semantic color tokens for AI and code. All values reference design-system/tokens/color-primitives.json only. Use these tokens in UI so theming and contrast stay consistent.

default.description: Main brand/primary actions: primary buttons, links, selected states, focus rings. Use for one primary action per context.

hover.description: Hover state for primary buttons and primary-styled links.

muted.description: Light primary tint: subtle backgrounds, badges, or highlights. Pair text with primitive.blue.800 or blue.900 for ≥4.5:1.

onPrimary.description: Text and icons on primary fill (e.g. button label). Contrast: white on blue.600 exceeds 4.5:1.

default.description: Secondary actions: secondary buttons, secondary links, less emphasis than primary. Use for alternative actions.

hover.description: Hover state for secondary buttons and secondary-styled links.

muted.description: Light secondary tint: neutral backgrounds and borders. Pair text with slate.700+ for ≥4.5:1.

onSecondary.description: Text and icons on secondary fill. Contrast: white on slate.600 exceeds 4.5:1.

base.description: Page and app root background (full-bleed shell). Light gray in light mode; pair with text.primary and text.secondary (verify contrast on zinc.50).

surface.description: Cards, panels, raised surfaces — white on light gray base. Text on surface: use text.primary (≥4.5:1).

surfaceElevated.description: Modals, dropdowns, popovers. Same white as surface in light theme; separate with border from primitive.gray.200 and shadow for ≥3:1 UI contrast vs layer below.

subtle.description: Subtle sections, disabled backgrounds. Pair text with gray.700+ for ≥4.5:1.

primary.description: Body and headings on light backgrounds. Contrast: gray.900 on white ≥7:1 (WCAG AA). Use for main content.

secondary.description: Supporting text, captions, labels. Contrast: gray.600 on white ≥4.5:1. Do not use for long paragraphs.

muted.description: Placeholders, hints, disabled text. Contrast: gray.500 on white ~4.5:1; prefer on large text or non-critical UI.

inverse.description: Text on dark backgrounds (e.g. primary button, dark header). Ensure background is dark enough for ≥4.5:1.

default.description: Success states: confirmations, success messages, positive indicators. Contrast: green.600 on white ≥4.5:1.

muted.description: Success backgrounds, success badges. Pair text with green.800 or green.900 for ≥4.5:1.

onSuccess.description: Text/icons on success fill (e.g. success button). White on green.600 exceeds 4.5:1.

default.description: Warnings: caution messages, non-destructive alerts. Contrast: amber.600 on white ≥4.5:1 for normal text.

muted.description: Warning backgrounds, warning badges. Pair text with amber.800 or amber.900 for ≥4.5:1.

onWarning.description: Text/icons on warning fill. amber.900 on amber.600 meets 4.5:1; use for button labels on warning buttons.

default.description: Destructive actions, errors, critical alerts. Contrast: red.600 on white ≥4.5:1. Use for delete/remove and error text.

hover.description: Hover state for danger buttons and destructive links.

muted.description: Error backgrounds, error badges. Pair text with red.800 or red.900 for ≥4.5:1.

onDanger.description: Text and icons on danger fill (e.g. delete button). White on red.600 exceeds 4.5:1.
